description: 现场业务主题域，覆盖报花业务（加花/换花/减花/调花等）、任务管理、养护、初摆

objects.name: 报花业务
objects.description: 所有花卉业务单据，是现场运营的核心流水。biz_type_name为中文业务类型，biz_status_name为中文状态

objects.name: 日常任务
objects.description: 各类型工作任务（销售/内购/实摆变更/支持/初摆），追踪执行进度

objects.name: 养护覆盖
objects.description: 各养护人的养护覆盖率统计，按月汇总

objects.name: 初摆
objects.description: 新项目首次布置的进度追踪，含预算和实际花费

fewShots.question: 本月加花总共多少次？
fewShots.sql: SELECT count(*) as 加花次数 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = '加花' AND biz_month = '2026-03'

fewShots.question: 上个月哪个项目换花最多？
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, count(*) as 换花次数 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = '换花' AND biz_month = '2026-02' GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY 换花次数 DESC LIMIT 1

fewShots.question: 张三发起的报花单有哪些？
fewShots.sql: SELECT biz_code, biz_type_name, project_name, biz_status_name, apply_time FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE apply_user_name LIKE '%张三%' ORDER BY apply_time DESC

fewShots.question: 紧急的换花单目前什么状态？
fewShots.sql: SELECT biz_code, project_name, biz_status_name, apply_time FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = '换花' AND is_urgent = '是' AND biz_status_name NOT IN ('已完成', '作废') ORDER BY apply_time DESC

fewShots.question: 各类报花业务分布
fewShots.sql: SELECT biz_type_name, count(*) as 单数, sum(plant_number) as 总数量 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_month = '2026-03' AND biz_status_name NOT IN ('作废', '驳回', '草稿') GROUP BY biz_type_name ORDER BY 单数 DESC

fewShots.question: 进行中的任务有哪些？
fewShots.sql: SELECT task_code, task_title, task_type_name, project_name, leading_user_name, completion_rate FROM v_task_progress WHERE task_status_name = '进行中' ORDER BY launch_time DESC

fewShots.question: 养护覆盖率低于80%的项目
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, curing_user_name, coverage_rate, total_position_count, covered_position_count FROM v_curing_coverage WHERE curing_month = '2026-03' AND coverage_rate < 0.8 ORDER BY coverage_rate

fewShots.question: 初摆中的任务还有几个？
fewShots.sql: SELECT count(*) as 数量 FROM v_pendulum_progress WHERE pendulum_status_name = '初摆中'
